name: stock-broker-dashboard
description: Production-grade real-time stock broker client web dashboard with simulated market data

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.render-build: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
